Our mission is to provide world-class education and training in the fields of film, photography, and digital media. With a strong emphasis on practical learning and industry exposure, we equip our students with the skills and knowledge they need to succeed in the creative industry. Our state-of-the-art facilities and experienced faculty provide a stimulating learning environment. We offer a variety of programs, including Filmmaking Courses, Photography Workshops and Digital Media Courses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Accounting Lecturer Job at PEFTI Film Institute




        
    

        
        PEFTI Film Institute, your Gateway to Creative Excellence, is a renowned institution dedicated to nurturing and honing creative talent. Our mission is to provide world-class education and training in the fields of film, photography, and digital media. With a strong emphasis on practical learning and industry exposure, we equip our students with the skills and knowledge they need to succeed in the creative industry. Our state-of-the-art facilities and experienced faculty provide a stimulating learning environment. We offer a variety of programs, including Filmmaking Courses, Photography Workshops and Digital Media Courses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accounting Lecturer
     

            
    



Job Location: Ajao Estate, Isolo - Lagos

Requirement


	Minimum of a BSc Degree.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position and discipline as the subject of the mail (Eg: Application as Lecturer in - Specify course).

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Success Analyst",
  "description": "Quidax is an African focused cryptocurrency exchange. We enable customers to buy/sell Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies (Ethereum, USDT and Litecoin) with Naira.

Our vision, which is at the core of what we do every day at Quidax, is to build a world where sending money and value around the globe is as easy as sending a text message. We value positive energy, and clear communication and are committed to building an inclusive environment for people from every background.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Success Analyst

Job Location: Remote
Job Type: Full time

About the Role


	We are looking for a Customer Success Analyst to help deliver a fast, reliable and valuable experience to Quidax customers across both fiat and crypto transactions.
	This role will sit at the intersection of customer support, customer operations and customer retention; helping customers resolve issues quickly, stay engaged with the product and get more value from their experience over time.
	This is a great role for someone who enjoys solving customer problems, spotting patterns in behavior and turning customer feedback and data into actions that improve experience, trust and long-term customer value.


What You&rsquo;ll Be Owning
Customer Support and Issue Resolution:
Within your first 60- 90 days:


	Own customer issues across fiat and crypto transactions from first contact to resolution, ensuring customers get timely, accurate, and empathetic support..
	Handle account, transaction, verification and product related queries while meeting agreed SLA and quality expectations.


Customer Health, Behaviour and Insight Tracking:
Within your first 180 days:


	Track recurring customer pain points, onboarding drop-offs, inactivity patterns and repeat complaints that may signal churn or low engagement.
	Contribute to customer health and retention reporting by turning support interactions and behavioural patterns into useful insights.
	Help the team understand which customer segments need more support, education or intervention to stay active and successful on Quidax.


Product, Operations and Customer Excellence:
Within your first 60 - 90 days:


	Surface bugs, transaction failures, recurring complaints, and operational gaps quickly and clearly to the right internal teams.
	Work closely with Product, Engineering and Compliance to investigate customer-impacting issues and move them to resolution.
	Contribute to improvements in workflows, support content, SOPs and internal documentation based on recurring customer friction.


Biggest Challenges You&rsquo;ll Tackle


	Balancing fast, high-quality support with more proactive retention work in a business where customer issues can be urgent, technical and time-sensitive.
	Connecting the dots between support conversations, customer behaviour and churn risk so we can understand why customers disengage and what to improve.
	Helping rebuild customer confidence after poor experience by not just resolving issues, but also improving trust, clarity and the likelihood that customers continue using Quidax.


What We&rsquo;re Looking For


	2+ years of cognate experience in customer support, customer success or customer operations, ideally in fintech, crypto, payments, banking or other regulated environments.
	Strong written and verbal communication, sound judgement and the ability to handle customer issues that require investigation, follow-through and clear coordination across teams
	A proactive customer-minded approach with the ability to spot patterns, surface useful insights, and contribute to retention, customer experience, and process-improvement work beyond day-to-day ticket handling.
	You&rsquo;re comfortable handling customer problems that involve transactions, timelines, multiple moving parts and some investigation.
	You&rsquo;re comfortable working with data; sorting, cleaning, analysing and using support or transaction data to spot patterns, track issues and support decision making.


Reporting Line:


	This role reports to the Customer Success Team Lead and works closely with the Customer Success team on support delivery, retention initiatives, issue resolution and customer experience improvements.
	This role will also collaborate regularly with Product, Engineering, Compliance and Operations to investigate customer issues and improve the customer journey over time.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-17",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-18",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Quidax"
    
  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja, Enugu, Lagos, Rivers (PH)",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

}



Customer Success Analyst Job at Quidax




        
    

        
        Quidax is an African focused cryptocurrency exchange. We enable customers to buy/sell Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies (Ethereum, USDT and Litecoin) with Naira.

Our vision, which is at the core of what we do every day at Quidax, is to build a world where sending money and value around the globe is as easy as sending a text message. We value positive energy, and clear communication and are committed to building an inclusive environment for people from every background.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Success Analyst

Job Location: Remote
Job Type: Full time

About the Role
     

            
    




	We are looking for a Customer Success Analyst to help deliver a fast, reliable and valuable experience to Quidax customers across both fiat and crypto transactions.
	This role will sit at the intersection of customer support, customer operations and customer retention; helping customers resolve issues quickly, stay engaged with the product and get more value from their experience over time.
	This is a great role for someone who enjoys solving customer problems, spotting patterns in behavior and turning customer feedback and data into actions that improve experience, trust and long-term customer value.


What You’ll Be Owning
Customer Support and Issue Resolution:
Within your first 60- 90 days:


	Own customer issues across fiat and crypto transactions from first contact to resolution, ensuring customers get timely, accurate, and empathetic support..
	Handle account, transaction, verification and product related queries while meeting agreed SLA and quality expectations.


Customer Health, Behaviour and Insight Tracking:
Within your first 180 days:


	Track recurring customer pain points, onboarding drop-offs, inactivity patterns and repeat complaints that may signal churn or low engagement.
	Contribute to customer health and retention reporting by turning support interactions and behavioural patterns into useful insights.
	Help the team understand which customer segments need more support, education or intervention to stay active and successful on Quidax.


Product, Operations and Customer Excellence:
Within your first 60 - 90 days:


	Surface bugs, transaction failures, recurring complaints, and operational gaps quickly and clearly to the right internal teams.
	Work closely with Product, Engineering and Compliance to investigate customer-impacting issues and move them to resolution.
	Contribute to improvements in workflows, support content, SOPs and internal documentation based on recurring customer friction.


Biggest Challenges You’ll Tackle


	Balancing fast, high-quality support with more proactive retention work in a business where customer issues can be urgent, technical and time-sensitive.
	Connecting the dots between support conversations, customer behaviour and churn risk so we can understand why customers disengage and what to improve.
	Helping rebuild customer confidence after poor experience by not just resolving issues, but also improving trust, clarity and the likelihood that customers continue using Quidax.


What We’re Looking For


	2+ years of cognate experience in customer support, customer success or customer operations, ideally in fintech, crypto, payments, banking or other regulated environments.
	Strong written and verbal communication, sound judgement and the ability to handle customer issues that require investigation, follow-through and clear coordination across teams
	A proactive customer-minded approach with the ability to spot patterns, surface useful insights, and contribute to retention, customer experience, and process-improvement work beyond day-to-day ticket handling.
	You’re comfortable handling customer problems that involve transactions, timelines, multiple moving parts and some investigation.
	You’re comfortable working with data; sorting, cleaning, analysing and using support or transaction data to spot patterns, track issues and support decision making.


Reporting Line:


	This role reports to the Customer Success Team Lead and works closely with the Customer Success team on support delivery, retention initiatives, issue resolution and customer experience improvements.
	This role will also collaborate regularly with Product, Engineering, Compliance and Operations to investigate customer issues and improve the customer journey over time.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at the Label Store
content:
The Label Store is a dynamic retail business that caters to a diverse range of customer needs. In addition to clothing and accessories, they also offer a carefully curated selection of groceries. With an emphasis on high-quality and healthy products, The Label Store's grocery section is a favorite among health-conscious shoppers. From fresh produce to pantry staples, The Label Store ensures that all of their products meet strict quality standards. With a dedication to offering an unparalleled shopping experience, The Label Store has become a one-stop-shop for customers looking for fashion-forward clothing, stylish accessories, and wholesome groceries.

We are  recruiting to fill the following positions below: 
     

            
    



1.) Production Auditor

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking to engage a young, vibrant, intelligent, and result-oriented lady to join our Production Team as a Production Auditor.
	The ideal candidate must possess strong knowledge of food production, pastries, bakery, or kitchen operations, demonstrate exceptional leadership ability, and maintain the highest standards of integrity and accountability.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor daily production activities across the Bakery, Pastry, and Kitchen units to ensure strict compliance with approved recipes, production procedures, and quality standards.
	Conduct routine and surprise audits of production processes to identify wastage, leakages, pilferage, and operational inefficiencies.
	Verify raw material usage against production output and investigate all production variances.
	Ensure proper documentation of material requisitions, production records, transfers, and stock movements.
	Monitor adherence to hygiene, food safety, sanitation, and health standards.
	Carry out physical verification of raw materials, work-in-progress, and finished products.
	Prepare accurate daily, weekly, and monthly production audit reports with recommendations for improvement.
	Investigate customer complaints relating to product quality and recommend corrective actions.
	Work closely with Production Supervisors, Inventory Officers, Procurement, and Management to improve productivity and minimize losses.
	Ensure staff comply with company policies, standard recipes, portion control, and operational procedures.
	Report all irregularities, policy violations, and disciplinary concerns promptly to Management.
	Support Management in improving production efficiency, reducing costs, and maintaining consistent product quality.


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc. or HND in Food Technology, Hospitality Management, Home Economics, Catering Management, Nutrition, Business Administration, or any related discipline.
	5–10 years of relevant experience in food production, bakery, pastries, restaurant operations, quality assurance, or production auditing.
	Practical knowledge of bakery, pastry, kitchen, or food production processes.
	Strong understanding of food hygiene, quality control, inventory management, and production standards.
	Excellent analytical and reporting skills with keen attention to detail.
	Good leadership and supervisory abilities with the confidence to enforce standards.
	High level of honesty, integrity, professionalism, and unquestionable character.
	Ability to identify operational inefficiencies, wastage, and non-compliance.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Microsoft Word.

3.) Storekeeper 

Job Location: Surulere, Lagos

Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Store Keeper will be responsible for the effective management of inventory, storage facilities, stock movement, and record keeping within the supermarket.
	The ideal candidate must possess strong organizational skills, maintain accurate inventory records, and ensure that stock is received, stored, and issued efficiently while minimizing losses and discrepancies.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive, inspect, and verify all incoming goods against purchase orders, invoices, and delivery notes.
	Ensure proper documentation and recording of all stock received and issued.
	Maintain accurate inventory records using manual and computerized systems.
	Monitor stock levels and promptly report low stock, overstocking, or discrepancies to management.
	Organize and arrange products in the store according to established standards and safety procedures.
	Conduct daily, weekly, and monthly stock counts and inventory reconciliation exercises.
	Investigate inventory variances and provide reports on stock shortages, damages, and losses.
	Ensure proper labeling, categorization, and storage of all products.
	Coordinate with procurement, warehouse, and sales teams to ensure adequate stock availability.
	Maintain cleanliness, orderliness, and security of the store and storage areas.
	Monitor product expiry dates and ensure timely removal or reporting of expired and damaged goods.
	Prepare and submit periodic inventory, stock movement, and variance reports.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, inventory control procedures, and health and safety regulations.
	Support management during stock audits and operational reviews.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor's Degree (B.Sc.) in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Logistics, Accounting, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in inventory management, store keeping, warehouse operations, or a similar role.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel.
	Experience using inventory management software will be an added advantage.
	Strong numerical and analytical skills.
	Excellent record-keeping and documentation abilities.
	High level of integrity, accountability, and attention to detail.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to  work independently and as part of a team.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


Competencies:


	Inventory Control and Management
	Stock Reconciliation
	Record Keeping and Documentation
	Attention to Detail
	Time Management
	Problem Solving
	Teamwork and Collaboration
	Organizational Skills.


Salary & Benefits


	N100,000 - N120,000 Monthly.
	Competitive salary package.
	Career growth and development opportunities.
	Professional and supportive work environment.
	Training and capacity-building opportunities.


Application Closing Date: 20th July, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their updated CV and application to: [email protected] using "Application for Store Keeper Position" as the subject of the email.
